meta.franchisor_address: 8400 E. Prentice Avenue, Suite 1500, Greenwood Village, Colorado 80111
meta.business_description: Non-medical at-home care business providing seniors and veterans with daily living assistance and at-home care, and related services and products

affiliates.name: Homecare Hub of New Mexico, LLC

principals.name: Daniel Deak
principals.title: Chief Executive Officer / Founder
prior_experience: President, Homecare Hub of Iowa, LLC (Dec 2021–present)
President, Homecare Hub of New Mexico, LLC (Dec 2021–present)
President, Homecare Hub of Wisconsin, LLC (Oct 2021–present)
President, Homecare Hub of Colorado, LLC (Mar 2024–present)
Business Development Director / Launch Director / Director of Training, FirstLight Home Care Franchising, Cincinnati, OH (Sept 2019–Oct 2022)

item3_litigation.statement: No litigation is required to be disclosed in this Item.

item4_bankruptcy.statement: No bankruptcy is required to be disclosed in this Item.

item5_initial_fees.veteran_discount: 10% off first territory IFF for honorably discharged US military

item6_ongoing_fees.royalty_minimum: Minimum Weekly Royalty Fee per territory, escalating from $144 (months 7-12) to $1,010 (months 73+)
item6_ongoing_fees.royalty_out_of_territory: 10% of Gross Sales for Out of Territory Customers
item6_ongoing_fees.local_marketing_minimum: Greater of 2% of monthly Gross Sales or $1,000 per territory per month
item6_ongoing_fees.contact_center: Up to 3% of monthly Gross Sales (not currently assessed)
item6_ongoing_fees.transfer_fee: $10,000 (existing franchisee) / $20,000 (new) / up to current IFF (if franchisor procures)
item6_ongoing_fees.renewal_fee: Greater of $7,500 or 15% of then-current IFF
item6_ongoing_fees.interest_rate: 18% per annum (subject to state legal maximum)

item10_financing.statement: We do not offer direct or indirect financing. We do not guarantee your note, lease or other obligation.

item11_training.location: Online + Greenwood Village, CO + Franchisee's Territory
item11_training.cost: No charge for franchisee + 1 manager; $500 per additional attendee
item11_training.time_to_open: 1 to 4 months (must open within 120 days of signing)

reserved_rights: Acquire/develop any business (even same services) under different marks within territory
Alternative distribution channels (internet, catalog, telemarketing) within territory
item12_territory.out_of_territory_service: Permitted in Open Areas (unassigned, within 10-mile radius) with approval, at 10% royalty. Must surrender when area becomes assigned.
item12_territory.corporate_accounts: Franchisor negotiates; franchisee may refuse but franchisor can service in your territory

item13_trademarks.indemnification: Franchisor will indemnify for trademark infringement if franchisee used marks as authorized

item14_patents.copyrights: May copyright advertising materials, manuals, written materials

item15_participation.personal_guarantee: All owners and spouses must personally guarantee

renewal_conditions: Sign then-current FA (may be materially different)
item17_renewal_termination.termination_by_franchisee: If in compliance, franchisor in material breach, 30-day cure

noncompete.during_term: No involvement in any competitive business
noncompete.post_term_geographic: Operating Territory + 25-mile radius + any other Home Halo territory

item18_public_figures.statement: We do not currently use any public figure to promote our franchise.

item19_fpr.data_basis: Company-owned outlet only (no franchise outlets exist)

excluded_outlet.reason: Not operational full 2024 Calendar Year (opened May 2024)

critical_caveats: Data from ONE company-owned outlet only — no franchise data exists
Outlet serves 2-territory equivalent (500K pop) vs 1-territory for typical franchisee
Primarily VA-referred clients — reimbursement rates vary by location
Data is unaudited, not prepared on GAAP basis
Direct Gross Profit excludes managerial/admin labor, operating expenses, interest, taxes, depreciation, amortization
Contact Center Fee cap stated as 5% in Table 2 footnote (vs 3% in Item 6)
item19_fpr.substantiation: Written substantiation available upon reasonable request

item20_outlets.gag_clause_note: No confidentiality clauses signed restricting franchisees from discussing experiences

key_observations: Extremely thin capitalization — $29,513 total assets (all cash)
Revenue solely from Iowa affiliate royalties ($55,013) — no franchise fee revenue
No fixed assets, no debt, no receivables, no payables
Entity less than 1 year old at statement date
Cover page risk factor #4 flags financial ability concern

agreements_listed: Schedule 1 — Operating Territory and Operations Center Acknowledgment
Exhibit 1 — Owner and Spouse Agreement and Guaranty
Exhibit 3 — Assignment of Telephone Numbers and Digital Media Accounts

unresolveds.description: Date inconsistency in Item 1 (page 9): Iowa and NM affiliates described as operating 'as Home Halo Agency' both 'prior to December 31, 2024' and 'as of January 1, 2024' — likely editorial typo for January 1, 2025
Contact Center fee cap contradiction: Item 6 says 3% cap; Item 19 Table 2 Footnote 6 says 'up to 5%'. Franchise Agreement Article 5.D. confirms 3% cap.
unresolveds.source: Items 6 vs 19, pages 16 and 43; FA Article 5.D., page 95

unresolveds.description: Financial viability flagged on cover page (risk factor #4): total assets $29,513, 'calls into question financial ability to provide services and support'
All 3 primary trademarks are pending USPTO registration only — not federally registered. Cover page risk factor #6.
Item 20 Table 1 net change: Total Outlets 2024 shows +2 but arithmetic suggests +1 (start 1, end 2). Possible source document error.
No related party transaction note in financial statements despite 100% of revenue ($55,013) from Iowa affiliate. Potential disclosure gap.
Income statement shows $1,414 Amortization & Depreciation but balance sheet shows $0 fixed assets and $0 accumulated depreciation. Minor financial statement inconsistency.

contradictions.description: Contact Center fee cap: Item 6 (table + Note 9) and FA Article 5.D. state cap of 3% of monthly Gross Sales. Item 19 Table 2 Footnote 6 states 'up to 5% of Gross Sales.'
contradictions.resolution_status: Unresolved — FA Article 5.D. confirms 3% cap, suggesting Item 19 footnote is erroneous

contradictions.description: Iowa/NM affiliate operating dates: Item 1 states 'prior to December 31, 2024, the business operated as a Home Halo Agency' then 'As of January 1, 2024, the business operated as a Home Halo Agency' — dates do not reflect a change

special_risks.detail: Spouse must sign guaranty for all financial obligations
Minimum royalty and advertising fund payments regardless of sales
Franchisor financial condition calls into question ability to provide services and support
Early stage of development with limited operating history
